states.loadingDescription: Please wait while the content is prepared.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor projects, model providers, and indexing tasks.
dashboard.systemStatusDescription: Review backend health, model providers, and index jobs in one place.
dashboard.emptyProjects: No projects yet. Created projects will appear here.
dashboard.emptyRecentProjects: No opened projects yet. Open one from the projects page.
dashboard.primaryFlowDescription: Create a project, organize the Story Bible, then open the editor to generate a plan or continue prose with the right context.

create.title: Create project
create.description: Capture the story core, genre tags, and key constraints.

prepare.title: Prepare canon
prepare.description: Review the premise, world rules, characters, and chapter plan.

write.title: Write chapters
write.description: Pick a chapter, preview context, then generate a plan or prose.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Manage writing projects and quickly find the right workspace by status, setup, or recent activity.
projects.libraryDescription: Manage every writing project with search, filters, sorting, view mode, and density controls.
projects.emptyDescription: After creating a project, you can review story bible status, chapter count, and open it here.

search.label: Search project library
search.placeholder: Search title, id, slug, status, premise, genre, tone, audience, tags, or Active Bible ID

states.loadingDescription: Reading projects, setup state, and recently opened items.
states.emptyDescription: Create the first project to unlock search, filters, and workspace entry actions.
states.noResultsDescription: Change the search term, status, or Story Bible filters and try again.

projectNew.title: Create project
projectNew.description: Start with the story direction. The system will turn it into a maintainable story bible.
projectNew.name: Project name

assistant.title: AI setup assistant
assistant.description: Optional: let the system refine the current inputs into a cleaner project seed.

projectNew.createdDescription: The project has been created and opened. Continue in the workspace to refine setup and chapters.
projectNew.finalizeDescription: Confirm the key inputs, then create the project and generate the initial Story Bible for ongoing edits.
projectNew.pendingHint: Some required story inputs are still missing. Fill them in before creating the project.
projectNew.readyHint: Core inputs are ready. You can create the project and generate the initial setup.

core.title: Story core
core.description: Set the project name, one-line brief, and genre tags.

setup.title: World and conflict
setup.description: Add the world background, protagonist, and central conflict for a stable setup.

style.title: Style and boundaries
style.description: Describe the target style and what to avoid so generation stays on track.

projectNew.summaryDescription: Review the core information that will initialize the project.

defaults.title: Public Records
defaults.brief: A records clerk discovers that public archives and private memory contradict each other.
defaults.world: The city's public archive system preserves every key event, but unexplained record conflicts have begun to appear.
defaults.protagonist: A records clerk responsible for auditing the city's public archive.
defaults.conflict: The protagonist must find a verifiable truth between personal memory and public records.
defaults.avoid: Avoid deus ex machina, over-explaining, and unsupported key reversals.

projectOverview.prepDescription: Before writing prose, confirm that core canon, characters, and foreshadowing are usable.

rules.title: World rules
rules.description: Maintain rules, limits, and canon constraints that affect continuity checks.

characters.title: Character files
characters.description: Review character goals, wounds, secrets, and current roles.

foreshadows.title: Foreshadowing
foreshadows.description: Confirm planted details, payoff hints, and current status.

sectionDescriptions.story: Edit the premise, themes, world rules, and foreshadowing.
sectionDescriptions.characters: Maintain the cast list and writing constraints for each character.

placeholders.worldRule: Write a canon rule or constraint.

characterGenerator.title: Generate syncable character profiles
characterGenerator.description: Generate a complete protagonist profile or a new key character. The result is written into the current Story Bible and synced to real backend characters after save.
characterGenerator.failed: Character draft generation failed. Check the current Story Bible.

prompts.protagonist: Generate or complete the protagonist profile. Include name, role, desire/goal, wound/gap, and secret, and anchor it tightly to the current premise.
prompts.character: Generate one key character suitable for the next stage of this story. Include name, role, desire/goal, wound/gap, and secret.

localFallback.protagonistWound: Paid a price because of “{rule}” and now resists trusting systems again.
localFallback.protagonistSecret: Has not revealed key information tied to “{theme}”.
localFallback.supportingDesire: Wants to use “{premise}” to change their situation.
localFallback.supportingWound: Developed a rigid stance under the influence of “{rule}”.
localFallback.supportingSecret: Holds a hidden clue tied to “{theme}”.

taskBoard.emptyProject: No index jobs for this project yet.

tooltips.providerType: The model provider type determines the upstream protocol and request format. API Key, Base URL, and model refresh must match it.
tooltips.baseUrl: The upstream API endpoint. A wrong Base URL can look like an authentication or model refresh failure.
tooltips.apiKey: Only API Key is saved. Leave it blank while editing to keep the saved key; enter a new key to replace it.
tooltips.streaming: Streaming returns content incrementally. Disable it when the upstream provider or model does not support streaming.
tooltips.modelKind: Model kind separates text generation models from embedding models and affects routing and indexing.
tooltips.contextWindow: Maximum context window accepted by the model, measured in Token.
tooltips.maxOutputTokens: Maximum output Token count allowed for one generation.
tooltips.dimension: Embedding vector dimension. It must match the vector collection dimension.
tooltips.routingWeight: When multiple candidates of the same kind are available, higher weight wins first.
tooltips.defaultForKind: Default candidate for a model kind when explicit model routing is empty.
tooltips.supportsTools: Whether this model supports tool calls or function calls.
tooltips.allowedRoles: Restrict which Agent roles may use this model. Empty means all roles are allowed.
tooltips.modelRouting: Model routing decides which model is used by each writing, review, or indexing role. Explicit settings outrank kind defaults and weights.
tooltips.roleRoute: Choose a model for this Agent role. Leave empty to use default model routing.
tooltips.embeddingRoute: Embedding routing affects index job vector dimensions. Rebuild vectors after changing it.
tooltips.indexJobs: Index jobs write chapter versions, facts, and graph data into retrieval/vector systems.
tooltips.indexJobKind: The index job type explains what object or workflow the job processes.
tooltips.indexJobScope: Project, chapter, and chapter version IDs locate the impact scope of this index job.
tooltips.indexJobAttempts: How many times the backend has tried to run this index job.
tooltips.indexJobCreatedAt: When this index job was queued.
tooltips.indexJobUpdatedAt: The latest status update time for this index job.
tooltips.indexJobError: Backend error returned when the index job failed.
tooltips.indexJobRawId: Raw backend index job ID for log lookup.
tooltips.indexJobPayload: Raw parameters attached to the index job.
tooltips.editorVersions: Saved chapter versions with prose, author role, word count, and index status.
tooltips.runLog: Run log shows model provider, model, Token-related context, tool trace, index freshness, and index jobs.
tooltips.modelResolution: The model provider, model, and route source resolved for this request.
tooltips.indexFreshness: Index freshness shows whether the latest chapter version has been indexed.
tooltips.toolTrace: Tool trace records context, graph, fact, or chapter tools called during generation.

models.title: Model settings
models.description: Manage model provider connections, the real model catalog, and the routing rules that actually take effect.
models.providerDialogDescription: Add or edit a model provider connection in a dialog. Leave API Key blank to keep the saved key.
models.modelDialogDescription: Maintain model context, output, embedding, and routing capabilities in a dialog.
models.apiKeyBlankKeepsExisting: When editing, leaving API Key blank keeps the saved key. Enter a new API Key only to replace it.
models.confirmDeleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. Make sure the target is no longer used by routing or projects.

writing.title: Writing and editing
writing.description: Model routes for chapter plans, prose continuation, and editorial checks.

canon.title: Canon and continuity
canon.description: Model routes for Story Bible, world rules, characters, and continuity audits.

knowledge.title: Knowledge and indexing
knowledge.description: Model routes for fact extraction, graph curation, and embeddings.

models.providerConnectionDescription: Configure real upstream connection details and model discovery here. Provider-level default model values are no longer treated as primary routing controls.
models.providerConnectionNoteDescription: Provider.default_model_id is still stored in configuration, but it does not participate in the current backend routing priority. It is shown here only as a note.
models.providerDraftDescription: Create a new upstream provider connection.
models.modelCatalogDescription: Only real backend-backed model fields are shown and edited here: kind, context window, output limit, dimension, routing weight, and role restrictions.
models.modelCatalogNoteDescription: This page no longer shows guessed capability tags, tiers, or best-for labels. Model refresh only syncs fields the backend can actually provide.
models.routingDescription: Configure the routing inputs that actually take effect, and keep vector rebuild maintenance in the same place.
models.allProvidersDescription: View and manage models from every provider.
models.name: Provider name
models.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the saved key; enter a new key only when replacing it
models.apiKeySavedUnverified: Saved key hint: {hint} (unverified; a wrong protocol or Base URL can also look like a credential error)
models.protocolCompatibilityHint: Provider type is the upstream protocol. The API key, Base URL, and model refresh endpoint must match that protocol; for example, an Anthropic key cannot be used with the OpenAI Chat protocol. Choosing the wrong protocol often appears as a credential error.
models.defaultModelIdStored: Stored but not used for current routing:
models.emptyProviders: No provider configurations yet. Click add to create multiple providers.
models.emptyModels: No models yet. Add one manually or refresh a selected provider.
models.allowedAgentRolesDescription: Leave all roles unselected to allow every role to use this model.
models.usageSettingsDescription: Explicitly assign providerId:modelId per feature. Leave blank to fall back to backend model selection.
models.routingPriorityDescription: This is the actual backend selection order, and the page wording now follows it directly.
models.routingPriorityFirst: An explicit model stored in settings(model_routing) for the specific feature.
models.routingPrioritySecond: If no explicit route exists, prefer models marked with default_for_kind within the same kind.
models.routingPriorityThird: If multiple candidates still remain, choose by routing_weight from high to low.
models.inheritRoutingDescription: Do not store an explicit route. Let default_for_kind + routing_weight decide.
models.unknownModel: Not found in current model list
models.disabledModelReason: This model is disabled and cannot be used as an explicit route.
models.confirmDeleteProvider: Delete provider “{name}”? Associated models will also be removed.

search.model: Search model name, provider, or ID
search.modelCatalog: Search name, ID, provider, kind, or role

states.emptyDescription: Add a model manually or refresh a provider to sync upstream models.
states.noResultsDescription: Change the search term or clear filters and try again.

models.embeddingMaintenanceTitle: Vector maintenance after embedding routing changes
models.embeddingMaintenanceDescription: These are explicit maintenance actions, not automatic routing changes. Rebuild the vector set first, then run pending indexing.
models.rebuildVectorsDescription: After changing embedding routing, use the backend rebuild-vectors entry to enqueue items that must be re-vectorized.
models.indexMaintenanceDescription: After rebuild jobs are queued, continue by running pending index jobs to write the actual vectors back into storage.

maintenance.failed: Maintenance failed. Check the error details.

errors.providerRequired: Select a provider for this model first.
errors.invalidNumber: {field} must be a number greater than or equal to 0.

editor.title: Chapter
editor.description: Edit content, save versions, and inspect real context hits plus execution diagnostics.
editor.referenceDescription: This panel shows the real reference materials available for the chapter, with this request's focused scope highlighted.
editor.emptyReference: No reference material is available yet.
editor.referenceFocusDescription: This is the focused scope for the current generation request, not a full fine-grained retrieval system. Unchecked items may still enter the system through normal project context retrieval.
editor.referenceFocusDefault: Use the current project context by default
editor.referenceFocusEmptyCharacters: There are no selectable characters in the Story Bible yet.

chapterPlan.label: Current chapter plan
chapterPlan.description: Use the editable chapter plan above as a focused reference for this request.

chapterSummary.label: Current chapter summary
chapterSummary.description: Use the current chapter summary from the Story Bible as a focused reference.

worldRules.label: World rules
worldRules.description: Explicitly require this request to prioritize world rules.

previousChapters.label: Reference previous N chapters
previousChapters.description: Select the N chapters before the current chapter in chapter order and include them in selection.chapter_ids.

characters.label: Characters
characters.description: Choose the Story Bible characters to focus on for this request.

autoCharacters.title: Auto-recommended characters
autoCharacters.description: When no manual character focus is selected, requests automatically include 1–3 key characters based on the chapter summary, plan, and instruction. Manual choices take priority.
autoCharacters.empty: No character can be auto-recommended yet.

unsyncedCharacters.message: These characters have not been synced as real characters yet, so AI context requests will not reference them: {names}. Save the Story Bible and complete character sync first.

editor.invalidChapterLabel: Target chapter {id} is not created yet
editor.invalidChapterNotice: Chapter {id} is not in the current chapter list. Generate or save to auto-create it and switch to the real chapter ID.

toolTrace.title: Tool trace
toolTrace.empty: This response did not return tool_trace.

editor.workflowHintDescription: Confirm the focused reference scope first, then generate a plan or continue prose. Index jobs are advanced by the backend in the background; this page only shows the real state.

runLog.title: Run log
runLog.description: Inspect the latest actual model resolution, index freshness, tool trace, and index jobs.
runLog.empty: No run log yet. Preview context or generate content first.

workspace.inspectorDescription: Organizes assistant information by context, generation, review, versions, and run log.

states.versionsDescription: Review and load saved versions for the current chapter.
states.loadingVersionsDescription: Reading saved versions for the current chapter.

editor.runLogTitle: Model, tokens, tool calls, and indexing
editor.runLogDescription: Review the model provider, routing, token-related context, tool trace, and index freshness used by the latest generation.
editor.planDescription: Generate a current-chapter idea first. Edit it until it is usable, then continue prose from that plan.
editor.draftDescription: The prose continuation uses the editable chapter plan above as the primary brief.
editor.planPromptPrefix: Create a story idea and chapter plan for the current chapter. Return beats, emotional turn, continuity notes, and ending hook. Do not write final prose yet.
editor.draftPromptPrefix: Continue the chapter prose based on the approved chapter plan below.
editor.noIndexJobs: No index jobs for this project yet. Saving a chapter version will create a re-indexing task.
editor.emptyVersions: No chapter versions yet. Saved versions will appear here.

preview.title: Actual context hit
preview.description: Preview the real ContextPack, index freshness, and model routing result that the backend will use for the current selection.
preview.empty: No preview result yet. Pick a focused scope, then preview plan or draft context.
preview.emptyStructuredContext: This preview returned no structured retrieval content to display.
preview.summaryText: {chapterSummaryCount} chapter summaries, {entityCount} entities, {factCount} facts, {plotThreadCount} plot threads, {worldRuleCount} world rules

continuityAudit.title: Continuity audit
continuityAudit.description: Shows the real continuity_audit payload returned by the backend. The frontend does not generate or infer extra conclusions.
continuityAudit.empty: No continuity audit result is available yet. Generate a draft to see the real audit output.
continuityAudit.passed: This continuity audit returned no issues.

summary.empty: No continuity audit result is available yet. Generate a draft to see the real audit output.
summary.passed: A continuity audit result is available and no issues were found.
summary.hasIssues: A continuity audit result is available with {count} issues.

diagnostics.title: Execution diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Shows the real model route, index freshness, and latest index job states currently in effect.
diagnostics.empty: No execution diagnostics are available yet.
diagnostics.emptyModelResolution: No model resolution is available yet.
diagnostics.emptyFreshness: No freshness result is available yet.
diagnostics.emptyIndexJobs: There are no recent index jobs yet.

defaults.title: Chapter One
defaults.content:
The protagonist wakes at dawn and realizes last night's records do not match his memory.

An unsigned note sits on the desk, warning him not to trust the first testimony.
defaults.prompt: Expand the opening of this chapter: establish the central conflict and preserve one recoverable clue.
defaults.chapterPlan:
Story idea:
- Establish the chapter question.
- Let the protagonist act on a concrete clue.
- End with a recoverable hook.

Chapter plan:
1. Re-anchor the scene and viewpoint.
2. Escalate through one new discovery.
3. Preserve continuity and stop before over-revealing.
defaults.emptyContent: No saved content for this chapter yet. Start from the plan, or generate prose after editing it.
defaults.chapterPlanFromSummary:
Story idea:
{summary}

Chapter plan:
1. Clarify the scene goal.
2. Develop the conflict around the summary.
3. End with a concrete hook.
defaults.styleConstraints: Restrained, clear, short paragraphs, avoid exposition dumps

currentChapter.title: Current chapter
currentChapter.description: Confirm the chapter title and where you are writing now.

chapterGoal.title: Chapter goal
chapterGoal.description: Advance the conflict and leave a verifiable clue.

nextAction.description: Confirm the focused reference scope, then generate a plan or continue prose.

plan.name: Generate idea / plan

review.name: Check consistency
review.message: Review results will appear after generation.

errors.previewContextRemoved: Context preview is temporarily unavailable. Generate a plan or continue prose directly; this page will show the actual model route, tool trace, and index state after generation.
errors.noAgentConfigured: No enabled agent is available. Create and enable a writing or plot agent in Agent Management first.

agents.title: Agent resources
agents.description: Manage Agents, Skills, MCP Servers, and Tools by resource type while preserving real backend save, delete, enable, scan, test, and tool refresh actions.

sections.agentsDescription: Maintain Agent roles, system prompts, and enabled state.
sections.skillsDescription: Maintain inline skills or scan the default skill source.
sections.mcpDescription: Configure MCP connections, test connectivity, and refresh tool catalogs.
sections.toolsDescription: Search, filter, enable, or disable builtin, MCP, and skill tools.

search.agents: Search name, ID, description, role, project_id, model, or linked IDs
search.skills: Search name, ID, description, source_id, project_id, or path
search.mcp: Search name, ID, transport, status, project_id, command, or URL
search.tools: Search name, ID, description, kind, status, mcp_server_id, or source_id

skills.emptyDescription: Create an inline skill or scan the default skill source.

mcp.emptyDescription: Create an MCP Server, then test the connection and refresh tools.
mcp.noResultsDescription: Change the search term, status, enabled filter, or transport and try again.

tools.emptyDescription: Tools usually come from builtin abilities, skills, or MCP Server refreshes.
tools.noResultsDescription: Change the search term, kind, or status filter and try again.

dialogs.agentDescription: Maintain the Agent role, prompt, and enabled state.
dialogs.skillDescription: Maintain inline skill content and source identity.
dialogs.mcpDescription: Maintain MCP connection configuration. Test or refresh tools from the list after saving.

messages.mcpTestFailed: MCP connection test did not pass.
messages.skillScanComplete: Skill scan complete. {count} created or updated.
messages.toolsRefreshed: Tool refresh complete. {count} tools are available.

errors.mcpCommandRequired: stdio MCP Server requires a command.
errors.mcpUrlRequired: HTTP/SSE MCP Server requires a service URL.

agents.confirmDeleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. Make sure this resource is no longer referenced by projects or other resources.

graph.title: Story graph
graph.description: Explore characters, events, chapters, and canon rules in one dense graph workspace with search, filters, and sortable collections.
graph.nodeCollectionDescription: List graph nodes by the current scope, search query, and status filter. Select any node to open the details panel.
graph.edgeCollectionDescription: List relationship edges for the currently visible nodes, with endpoint search, type filters, weight, and timeline sorting.
graph.metadataDescription: Inspect raw metadata for the currently selected node or edge.
graph.controlsDescription: Adjust root, depth, timeline, and included types, then reload to send those parameters to graph expansion. Search and status filters narrow the current canvas instantly.
graph.emptyDetails: Select a node or edge in the graph to view details. If Cytoscape cannot load in this environment, use the canvas fallback node list to verify data.
graph.emptyEdges: No visible edges for the current filters.
graph.listUnavailableMessage: Graph rendering is temporarily unavailable. You can still inspect node data in the list below.
graph.timelineControlHint: Lowering the timeline hides later nodes and relationships; reload after increasing it if you need more data.
graph.depthControlHint: Lowering depth narrows the local scope; reload after increasing it if you need deeper expansion.

search.nodes: Search node name, ID, type, status, or metadata
search.edges: Search edge name, endpoints, type, or evidence ID

states.canvasLoadingDescription: Requesting graph expansion and initializing Cytoscape.
states.canvasEmptyDescription: This project has no renderable nodes yet, or graph expansion has not completed.
states.canvasNoResultsDescription: The current search, type, status, depth, or timeline combination did not match any nodes.

nodes.loadingDescription: Reading nodes returned by graph expansion.
nodes.emptyDescription: The current graph expansion did not return any nodes.
nodes.noResultsDescription: Adjust the search query, status filter, type scope, depth, or timeline and try again.

edges.loadingDescription: Reading relationship edges returned by graph expansion.
edges.emptyDescription: The current graph expansion did not return any relationship edges.
edges.noResultsDescription: Adjust the search query, relationship type, or node visibility scope and try again.

errors.cytoscapeFailed: Cytoscape could not load; list view is shown instead.
